summary: Daybook Detailed View feature fully tested and working. All 10 test cases passed. Backend API returns enriched transaction data with account names, categories, project/vendor info. Frontend displays detailed view dialog with filters (Account, Type, Search), CSV export, and Print functionality.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended

passed_tests: 1. Daybook page shows 'View Daybook' button when there are transactions - PASSED
2. Clicking 'View Daybook' opens detailed transaction dialog - PASSED
3. Dialog shows correct summary: 5 transactions, ₹58,000 inflow, ₹20,000 outflow, ₹38,000 net - PASSED
4. Transaction table shows all columns: Time, Account, Reference, Category/Purpose, Project/Vendor, Mode, Inflow, Outflow - PASSED
5. Filter by Account dropdown works (3 account options available) - PASSED
6. Filter by Type (Inflow/Outflow) dropdown works - filters correctly to 3 inflow transactions - PASSED
7. Search filter works - tested with 'Payment' search term - PASSED
8. CSV export button present and functional - PASSED
9. Print button present and functional - PASSED
10. Recent Closings: clicking transaction count opens detailed view - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Backend API GET /api/finance/daily-closing/{date}/transactions correctly enriches transactions with account names, category names, and project/vendor info
Frontend DailyClosing.jsx implements proper filtering (account, type, search) with getFilteredTransactions()
CSV export and Print functions work correctly with filtered data
Read-only view confirmed - no edit functionality present as required
seed_data_creation: Used existing transactions on date 2026-01-31 (5 transactions)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daybook detailed view feature is complete. Test date 2026-01-31 has 5 transactions: 2 internal transfers, 1 invoice payment, 2 customer payments. Accounts: Petty Cash, Bank of Baroda - Current. The dialog shows enriched data with account names, categories, and project/vendor info.
